title: BEM-865 Claude write diag
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('.')
report = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_CAPABILITY_DIAG.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md')
claude_task = Path('governance/tasks/pending/CLAUDE_INTERNAL_AUDIT_BEM859.md')
finals = ['APPROVED', 'APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS', 'BLOCKED_WITH_REASON']
response_text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
final_status = None
for s in finals:
    if s in response_text and 'PENDING_CLAUDE_RESPONSE' not in response_text:
        final_status = s
        break
candidates = []
for root in ['.github/workflows', 'tools', 'scripts', 'governance']:
    p = Path(root)
    if not p.exists():
        continue
    for f in p.rglob('*'):
        if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() in ['.py', '.yml', '.yaml', '.ts', '.js', '.md', '.json']:
            name = str(f)
            text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')[:20000]
            low = (name + '\n' + text).lower()
            if 'claude' in low or 'anthropic' in low or 'from_claude' in low or 'claude_internal_audit' in low:
                candidates.append(name)
writer_files = []
for name in candidates:
    text = Path(name).read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')[:50000]
    low = text.lower()
    if 'from_claude' in low and ('write_text' in low or 'contents/' in low or 'create file' in low or 'append' in low or 'git commit' in low or 'push' in low):
        writer_files.append(name)
status = 'FINAL_ALREADY_PRESENT' if final_status else ('WRITER_FOUND_WAITING' if writer_files else 'BLOCKED_NO_CLAUDE_WRITER')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-865 Claude write capability\nStatus: ' + status + '\nFinal status: ' + str(final_status) + '\nResponse mailbox exists: ' + str(response.exists()) + '\nClaude task exists: ' + str(claude_task.exists()) + '\nWriter files:\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + x for x in writer_files) + '\nCandidates:\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + x for x in candidates[:50]) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
report.write_text(marker.read_text(encoding='utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('Claude write capability diagnosis: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
